education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

experience.title: Software Development Engineering Intern
bullets: Reduced resolution time of 500+ tickets by 50%+ by developing a multi-AI-agent operations tool in Python for core Amazon Q service using AWS Strands Agents that autonomously finds the root cause of tickets cut to service.

Designed tools for agents using the AWS SDK and MCP servers, creating automations for 15+ developers that simplify service maintenance and provide immediate information about the team's code, design, and current status.

Scaled multi-agent system to become an internal service using AWS Lambda, achieving a 95% satisfaction as determined by custom CloudWatch metrics, all while working alongside developers to improve the agents' capabilities.

experience.company: Georgia Tech School of Computing Instruction
experience.title: Undergraduate Teaching Assistant – Design and Analysis of Algorithms (CS 3510)
bullets: Enhance understanding of advanced algorithm concepts for 500+ students by hosting office hours, answering questions on discussion platform, and contributing to exam review sessions, resulting in increased student performance.

Deliver targeted, actionable feedback on homework and exams alongside 20+ TAs, emphasizing efficient algorithm design principles and problem-solving skills, leading to improvements in student exam readiness.
